questions.text: All your afternoon meetings get cancelled. What's your first move?

answers.content: Go for a walk in the park and enjoy the sunshine.
Use the time to catch up on work or personal projects.
Call a friend and make plans to hang out.
Take a nap and recharge your energy.

questions.text: Your run into a bunch of your best friends hanging out without you

answers.content: Be direct and ask if you can join them.
Try to leave before they notice you
Pretend like you were in on the plans and just join them
Tell them your feelings were hurt and leave

questions.text: You're running late and need to get out the door, what do you grab first?
You have a free weekend coming up, how do you spend it?

answers.content: Plan a fun outing with friends or family.
Use the time to relax and unwind at home.
Take on a new hobby or project you've been interested in.
Go on an adventure and explore a new place.
